name: conduit-browser
description: A focused one-to-eight-pane Electron browser with one sync engine, selective following, explicit light and dark appearance modes, translucent controls, saved workspaces, and a simple local home page.

scripts.check: node --check src/main-entry-v18.js && node --check src/main-v18.js && node --check src/workspace-v18.js && node --check src/preload-v18.js && node --check src/page-preload-v18.js && node --check src/renderer/appearance-v19.js && node --check src/renderer/state-guard-v18.js && node --check src/renderer/app-v18.js && node --check src/adblocker.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/tor-manager.js && node --check src/tor-bridge.js && npm test
